art-colour-fun.welcome_message: Let us explore colours, use art tools, make simple art, and enjoy creating together.
art-colour-fun.meet_star_purpose: Together, we will explore colours, make art, and try new ideas. I will help you create and celebrate every step.

communication-champions.welcome_message: Let us listen, speak, share ideas, use kind words, and enjoy talking together.
communication-champions.meet_star_purpose: Together, we will listen, speak clearly, share ideas, and use kind words. I will help you try and celebrate every step.

confidence-builders.welcome_message: Let us believe in ourselves, try new things, speak with confidence, and grow together.
confidence-builders.meet_star_purpose: Together, we will try new things, make good choices, and believe in ourselves. I will help you be brave and celebrate every step.

creativity-challenges.welcome_message: Let us imagine, create, build ideas, try new ways, and enjoy making together.
creativity-challenges.meet_star_purpose: Together, we will imagine, create, build, and try new ideas. I will help you express yourself and celebrate every step.

curiosity-explorers.welcome_message: Let us ask questions, look closely, explore nature, and discover new things together.
curiosity-explorers.meet_star_purpose: Together, we will ask questions, look closely, explore, and discover. I will help you try, think, and celebrate every step.

fine-motor-fun.welcome_message: Let us strengthen our fingers, hold tools, trace, thread, and create carefully together.
fine-motor-fun.meet_star_purpose: Together, we will grip, move, trace, thread, and make. I will help you practise carefully and celebrate every step.

healthy-habits-safety.welcome_message: Let us wash our hands, eat well, stay active, follow safety rules, and care for ourselves.
healthy-habits-safety.meet_star_purpose: Together, we will practise healthy habits, stay safe, and express our needs. I will help you make caring choices every day.

logical-thinking-adventures.welcome_message: Let us match, sort, find patterns, compare, and solve simple problems together.
logical-thinking-adventures.meet_star_purpose: Together, we will match, sort, compare, and solve problems. I will help you think, explain, and celebrate every step.

my-world-general-awareness.welcome_message: Let us learn about our families, communities, helpers, nature, and the world around us.
my-world-general-awareness.meet_star_purpose: Together, we will explore people, places, nature, and our community. I will help you notice, respect, and care.

stem-explorers.meet_star_purpose: Together, we will observe, build, test, and discover. I will help you ask questions, think, and celebrate every step.

communication-champions.welcome_message: Let us listen with attention, speak in sentences, share ideas, ask questions, and connect.
communication-champions.meet_star_purpose: Together, we will listen, speak, ask questions, and share ideas. I will help you communicate kindly and confidently.

early-literacy-adventures.welcome_message: Let us hear sounds, recognise letters, build words, enjoy rhymes, and explore stories.
early-literacy-adventures.meet_star_purpose: Together, we will play with sounds, letters, words, rhymes, and stories. I will help you read, think, and express ideas.

early-maths-adventures.meet_star_purpose: Together, we will count, compare, explore shapes, and solve problems. I will help you think and explain your ideas.

logical-thinking-adventures.meet_star_purpose: Together, we will sort, sequence, spot differences, and solve puzzles. I will help you think and explain each choice.

stem-explorers.welcome_message: Let us ask questions, observe changes, build models, test ideas, and share results.
stem-explorers.meet_star_purpose: Together, we will question, observe, build, test, and measure. I will help you think and share each discovery.

creativity-challenges.welcome_message: Let us generate ideas, draw, build designs, try alternatives, and share our creations.
creativity-challenges.meet_star_purpose: Together, we will imagine, draw, design, build, and improve. I will help you try new ways and celebrate your creations.

my-world-general-awareness.welcome_message: Let us explore our community, helpers, nature, places, cultures, and care for Earth.
my-world-general-awareness.meet_star_purpose: Together, we will explore people, places, nature, and cultures. I will help you understand, respect, and care for Earth.

healthy-habits-safety.welcome_message: Let us choose healthy food, practise hygiene, exercise, recognise danger, and stay safe.
healthy-habits-safety.meet_star_purpose: Together, we will make healthy choices, care for our bodies, manage feelings, and follow safety rules.

art-colour-fun.welcome_message: Let us mix colours, draw shapes, paint pictures, make crafts, and explore textures.
art-colour-fun.meet_star_purpose: Together, we will mix, draw, paint, craft, and explore textures. I will help you create and proudly share your artwork.

confidence-social-skills.welcome_message: Let us speak with confidence, make friends, share, take turns, and grow together.
confidence-social-skills.meet_star_purpose: Together, we will speak with confidence, make kind choices, understand our feelings, and solve small problems.

communication-masters.welcome_message: Let us listen carefully, speak clearly, build vocabulary, tell stories, and present ideas.

reading-literacy-adventures.meet_star_purpose: Together, we will read words and sentences, understand stories, and write ideas. I will help you grow as a reader.

maths-explorers.meet_star_purpose: Together, we will calculate, compare, explore geometry, measure, and solve problems. I will help you explain your thinking.

logic-brain-builders.meet_star_purpose: Together, we will find patterns, use spatial thinking, solve puzzles, and explain our reasoning step by step.

young-scientists.meet_star_purpose: Together, we will predict, test, observe, compare results, and explain findings. I will help you think like a scientist.

creative-design-studio.meet_star_purpose: Together, we will imagine, sketch, build, test, and improve designs. I will help you explain and present your ideas.

my-amazing-world.meet_star_purpose: Together, we will explore communities, cultures, nature, and our planet. I will help you respect and protect our world.

digital-explorers.meet_star_purpose: Together, we will use technology safely, create digitally, think in steps, and act kindly and responsibly.
